message.content:
@startuml
class "DataAnalysisCLI" as DataAnalysisCLI {
  +data: DataFrame
  +reader: KeyboardReader
  +DataAnalysisCLI()
  +run(): void
  +main(args: String[]): void
}

class "DataFrame" as DataFrame {
  -fileName: String
  -headerNames: String[]
  -numOfRows: int
  -numOfCols: int
  -csvData: double[][]
  +DataFrame(fileName: String)
  +toString(): String
  +getColumnByIndex(index: int): DataSeries
  +getHeaderNames(): String[]
  +getNumberOfRows(): int
  +getNumberOfCols(): int
}

class "KeyboardReader" as KeyboardReader {
  -reader: BufferedReader
  +KeyboardReader()
  +getKeyboardInput(): String
  +getKeyboardInteger(): int
  +getKeyboardDouble(): double
  +prompt(s: String): void
  +display(s: String): void
  -readKeyboard(): String
}

class "DataSeries" as DataSeries {
  -label: String
  -data: double[]
  -count: int
  +DataSeries(label: String)
  +size(): int
  +add(val: double): void
  +getMin(): double
  +getMax(): double
  +getSum(): double
  +getMean(): double
  +toString(): String
}

interface "IBasicStats" as IBasicStats {
  +getMin(): double
  +getMax(): double
  +getSum(): double
  +getMean(): double
}

DataAnalysisCLI --> DataFrame : 1
DataAnalysisCLI --> KeyboardReader : 1
DataFrame --> DataSeries : 1
DataSeries ..|> IBasicStats : 1

@enduml
